source:
"use strict";
Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true });
exports.loginCreatorSchema = exports.registerCreatorSchema = void 0;
const zod_1 = require("zod");
exports.registerCreatorSchema = zod_1.z.object({
    fullName: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .min(3, "Full name must be at least 3 characters"),
    email: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .email("Invalid email format"),
    password: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .min(6, "Password must be at least 6 characters"),
    phone: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .min(10, "Phone must be 10 digits")
        .max(10, "Phone must be 10 digits")
        .regex(/^[0-9]+$/, "Phone must contain only numbers"),
    city: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .min(2, "City is required"),
    yearsOfExperience: zod_1.z
        .number()
        .min(0, "Experience cannot be negative"),
    bio: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .min(20, "Bio must be at least 20 characters"),
    portfolioLink: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .url("Portfolio must be a valid URL")
        .optional(),
    profilePhoto: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .optional(),
    governmentId: zod_1.z
        .string(),
    specialties: zod_1.z
        .array(zod_1.z.string().min(2))
        .optional(),
});
exports.loginCreatorSchema = zod_1.z.object({
    email: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .email("Invalid email format"),
    password: zod_1.z
        .string()
        .min(6, "Password must be at least 6 characters"),
});
